author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--clock-skew
content: Decision: Implementing as a direct integration into the existing compaction pipeline rather than a standalone module, since compaction.rs already exists and is fully functional. The SkewViolation struct will be separate from the existing SkewWarning struct - SkewWarning uses Utc::now() as reference, SkewViolation uses git commit timestamps. Both serve complementary roles.
